summary: Complete testing of GoSocial Blog feature. All 16 test cases passed. Blog listing page renders correctly with title 'Blogs', search input, and all 6 category filter pills. Category filtering and search functionality work as expected. Featured post section displays when viewing 'All' category. All 6 blog detail pages load correctly with Table of Contents sidebar, breadcrumbs, title, meta info, hero image, article content, prev/next navigation, related articles, and CTA banner. Non-existent blog slug shows proper 'Article Not Found' page. Landing page footer Blog links navigate correctly to /blog. All existing features continue to work.
passed_tests: Blog listing page (/blog) renders with title 'Blogs'
Search input visible with data-testid='blog-search-input'
All 6 category filter pills visible (All, Social Selling, AI & Automation, Lead Generation, Creator Economy, CRM)
Category filtering works - clicking 'Social Selling' shows 2 posts
Category filtering works - clicking 'AI & Automation' shows 1 post
Category filtering works - clicking 'All' shows all 6 posts
Featured post section visible when 'All' category selected and no search
Featured post section hidden when category filtered or searching
Search functionality filters posts by title/excerpt ('AI Lead' returns 1 post)
No results message shown for non-existent search term
Blog grid shows all 6 articles when 'All' is selected
Blog navbar has correct links including Blog highlighted (font-semibold)
Blog detail page (/blog/:slug) has Table of Contents sidebar with 5 TOC links
Blog detail page has breadcrumb (Blog > Category)
Blog detail page has title, date, read time meta info
Blog detail page has hero image
Blog detail page has article content with 5 sections
Table of Contents links scroll to correct sections (tested 'implementing-scoring')
Previous/Next navigation links visible at bottom of blog detail
Related articles section shows 2 articles at bottom
CTA banner with 'Start free trial' button visible
All 6 blog slugs render correctly with title and TOC
Non-existent blog slug shows 'Article Not Found' with 'Back to Blog' button
Landing page footer has 2 Blog links
Footer Blog link navigates correctly to /blog
Landing page existing features still work (hero, navbar, solution tabs, feature tabs, pricing)
Login page accessible from hero CTA button
critical_code_review_comments: Blog feature is well-implemented with comprehensive data-testid attributes
Static blog data structure is clean and well-organized
Category filtering and search use useMemo for performance optimization
Table of Contents uses proper anchor links with scroll-mt-24 for offset
Previous/Next navigation handles circular navigation properly
Related articles logic properly fills gaps with other posts when same category has < 2
Non-existent slug handling with proper 404 state is implemented
seed_data_creation: None - blog uses static data in blogData.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Blog feature fully tested and working. Blog listing page (/blog) has search, category filters, featured posts, and grid display. All 6 blog detail pages work correctly with TOC, breadcrumbs, article content, prev/next navigation, related articles, and CTA. Non-existent slugs show proper 404 page. Landing page footer Blog links work. All previous features (landing page, login, dashboard) remain functional. Blog is static - no backend API calls needed.
